scenarios.prompt: Add a fetch_forecast() function to my package with full roxygen2 documentation, then regenerate the docs and NAMESPACE.
expectations: Writes a complete roxygen2 documentation block (@param, @return, @export at minimum)
Regenerates docs + NAMESPACE with devtools::document() (not hand-editing NAMESPACE)

scenarios.prompt: Get this package ready for CRAN submission — what checks and fixes do I need?
expectations: Runs R CMD check via devtools::check() and aims for 0 errors / 0 warnings
Mentions cross-platform checks (e.g. rhub::rhub_check() or win-builder) before submission
Explains how to resolve NOTEs/WARNINGs rather than ignoring them

scenarios.prompt: R CMD check warns that .data is undefined — how do I fix the NAMESPACE?
scenarios.expected_output: import .data from rlang via usethis::use_import_from('rlang', '.data'), then re-document
expectations: Uses usethis::use_import_from() or an @importFrom roxygen tag, then re-documents
Explains why the undefined-global NOTE arises with tidy evaluation

trigger_set.query: document my package functions with roxygen2 and rebuild the NAMESPACE
prepare my R package for CRAN submission and fix the check notes
scaffold a brand-new empty R package directory from scratch
write testthat unit tests for my new function
